_meta.description: Human control surface. Any agent that detects a condition requiring human judgment writes here. No agent promotes draft→active without a resolved review item (unless confidence >0.95 and risk=low).

records.reason: Context registry scaffolded from MA-CTX-001 spec. Founder review required to confirm schema accuracy, seed data quality, and build sequence completion before agents begin writing.
records.recommended_action: Review all 8 JSON registry files. Confirm shared envelope fields are correct. Spot-check 3-5 denial_codes entries against supabase/seed/denial_codes.sql. Confirm appeal_strategies are accurate to platform outputs. Mark resolved when satisfied.
records.notes: Scaffolded 2026-03-12. 20 denial codes seeded (52 in DB). 5 appeal strategies seeded. 5 regulations seeded. 5 SEO clusters planned. 5 content pages drafted.

records.reason: Story engine Gate 0 is eligible (Phase 1 shipped + first SEO article = unlock). HeyGen avatar selection and submission form consent language require founder decisions before Story Bank begins.
records.recommended_action: 1) Select HeyGen avatars: test 3 EN + 3 ES candidates with same script. 2) Draft submission form consent language and schedule attorney review. 3) Source, scrub, and approve 3 seed stories for Story Bank before Month 3 YouTube launch.
records.notes: Gate 0 unlock: platform live + first SEO article published. Attorney review of consent language is a hard stop before submitting form goes live.

records.reason: Phase 1 external agents (GEO-01/02/03, CNT-01) require installation from geo-seo-claude and agency-agents repos before they can write to context registry.
records.recommended_action: Install GEO-01/02/03 agents via geo-seo-claude repo (git clone + ./install.sh + /geo config). Build CNT-01 composite agent (technical-writer.md + legal-compliance-checker.md from agency-agents, prepend MA context). Configure agent write permissions per MA-CTX-001 Section 8.
records.notes: Signal-gated agents (MKT-01/02/03, PRD-01) remain deferred until Signal 1. Phase 1 agents are active threshold.

records.reason: MA-SEC-002 Priorities 21-24 (AI Content Security controls) were added during Phase 1 security audit session 9 but have not yet been synced to the Google Drive canonical doc.
records.recommended_action: Copy content from docs/security/MA-SEC-002-additions-priorities-21-24.md into the Google Drive MA-SEC-002 doc. Increment version. Mark all 24 controls as reviewed.
records.notes: Pending from Phase 1. Low urgency but creates governance drift if not resolved.
